properties.name: ssl.auto-trust.enabled
properties.description: Master switch. DEFAULT FALSE — starter does nothing until this is set to true. Enable via ssl.auto-trust.enabled=true or @EnableSslAutoTrust annotation.

properties.name: ssl.auto-trust.domains
properties.description: Comma-separated domain list. Accepts full HTTPS URLs (scheme+path stripped), bare hostnames, or host:port entries.

properties.name: ssl.auto-trust.export-dir
properties.description: Directory (relative to working dir) where .cer files and combined-truststore.jks are written. Created automatically.

properties.name: ssl.auto-trust.truststore-password
properties.description: Password for the persisted combined-truststore.jks (offline inspection only). Not used at runtime.

properties.name: ssl.auto-trust.default-https-port
properties.description: TCP port assumed when a domain entry has no explicit port.

properties.name: ssl.auto-trust.connect-timeout-ms
properties.description: Socket connect/read timeout in milliseconds for the bootstrap TLS cert-fetch handshake.

properties.name: ssl.auto-trust.rest-template-enabled
properties.description: When true, registers a RestTemplate @Bean with explicit SSL trust. Set to false if the consuming app provides its own RestTemplate bean.

values.description: Public — REST API, different cert chain
